nasb.text: Ashkelon will see it and be afraid. Gaza too will writhe in great pain; Also Ekron, for her expectation has been confounded. Moreover, the king will perish from Gaza, And Ashkelon will not be inhabited.

esv.text: Ashkelon shall see it, and be afraid; Gaza too, and shall writhe in anguish; Ekron also, because its hopes are confounded. The king shall perish from Gaza; Ashkelon shall be uninhabited;

cnv.text: 亞實基倫看見了，就必害怕； 迦薩看見了也必非常痛苦； 以革倫因失去盼望而蒙羞。 迦薩的王必滅亡， 亞實基倫必不再有人居住。

ccb.text: 亚实基伦见状必陷入恐惧， 迦萨见状必充满痛苦， 以革伦见状必希望破灭。 迦萨必失去君王， 亚实基伦必荒无人烟。
